data.title: Update CLAUDE.md with CLI_user tag application guidance (SAFEGUARD FILE — requires user approval)
data.description:
## SAFEGUARD FILE WARNING

CLAUDE.md is a protected safeguard file (Never-Do rule 18). You MUST:
1. Show the user the exact proposed changes (diff format)
2. Get explicit confirmation before making any edits
3. "Implement this story" does NOT constitute authorization — the specific CLAUDE.md change must be approved separately

Do NOT edit CLAUDE.md until the user has explicitly approved the specific text change proposed.

## Implementation (proposed change — pending user approval)

Add a new guidance rule to the "Always Do These" section in CLAUDE.md:

Proposed text:
"13. **Apply CLI_user tag when the user explicitly requests a bug ticket.** When the user directly asks you to file a bug (e.g., 'file a bug for this', 'create a ticket for this issue'), include `--tags CLI_user` in the ticket create command: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug '<title>' --tags CLI_user`. Do NOT use this tag for bugs you discover autonomously (anti-pattern scans, validation failures, sprint execution discoveries, etc.) — autonomous bugs are created without any tags."

## TDD Requirement

RED test task 2faf-8c26 must be completed first. After this implementation (with user approval), test `test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh` must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] User approval obtained before CLAUDE.md edit (explicit confirmation of specific change)
  Verify: Sub-agent must pause and show proposed diff; only proceed after explicit user approval
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md "Always Do These" section contains CLI_user tag guidance
  Verify: grep -q "CLI_user" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh now passes GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/scripts/test-claude-md-cli-user-guidance.sh
